LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT STANLEY ANASTASIO AS TRUSTEE OF THE 1986 ANASTASIO LIVING TRUST DATED APRIL 8, 1986'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEBRUARY 20, 2014. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STANLEY ANASTASIO'S MOTION FOR PARTIAL SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED. THERE IS NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO THE CONTRACTUAL INDEMNIFICATION AGREEMENT BETWEEN CROSS-COMPLAINANTS IN RELATION TO THE DUTY TO DEFEND. THE UNDERLYING LITIGATION IS EMBRACED BY THE TERMS OF THE INDEMNITY PROVISION, AND GIVES RISE TO THE DUTY TO DEFEND AS SOON AS THE CLAIM IS MADE AGAINST THE INDEMNITEE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR5976

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION (Ntc) By Stanley Anastasio As Trustee Of The 1986 Anastasio Living Trust Dated April 8, 1986 Against Wonderbar, Llc Dba Red Devil Lounge
Off Calendar Feb-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT STANLEY ANASTASIO'S MOTION FOR PARTIAL SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is granted. There is no triable issue of material fact as to the contractual indemnification agreement between cross-complainants in relation to the duty to defend. The underlying litigation is embraced by the terms of the indemnity provision, and gives rise to the duty to defend as soon as the claim is made against the indemnitee. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION (Ntc) By Stanley Anastasio As Trustee Of The 1986 Anastasio Living Trust Dated April 8, 1986 Against Wonderbar, Llc Dba Red Devil Lounge
